add-ons.name: Obsidian Vault
add-ons.description: Connect your Obsidian vault to Crow for reading, searching, and syncing notes
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH
env_vars.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault directory

add-ons.name: Home Assistant
add-ons.description: Control your smart home through Home Assistant — lights, temperature, switches, and more
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Ollama (Local AI)
add-ons.description: Run local AI models for embeddings, summarization, and content classification
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: RAM and disk depend on model size. Small models need ~2GB, large models need 8GB+.

add-ons.name: LocalAI
add-ons.description: OpenAI-compatible local AI server — chat, embeddings, and TTS without a cloud API
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: OpenAI-compatible API. Set AI_PROVIDER=openai and AI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/v1 to use with Crow AI Chat.

add-ons.name: Nextcloud
add-ons.description: Access Nextcloud files via WebDAV mount — sync documents, browse folders
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Immich Photos
add-ons.description: Search photos, browse albums, and manage your Immich photo library
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: IMMICH_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Immich API key (from Immich admin panel)

add-ons.notes: Connects to an existing Immich instance. Limited ARM64 support.

add-ons.name: File Storage (MinIO)
add-ons.description: S3-compatible file storage — upload, organize, and share files through Crow
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
env_vars.description: MinIO admin password (choose a strong password)

add-ons.notes: After installation, Crow's storage tools (upload, list, delete files) are available automatically. MinIO console at http://localhost:9001.

add-ons.name: Podcast Publisher
add-ons.description: Publish podcast episodes with iTunes-compatible RSS feeds
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Extends the blog server — podcast episodes are blog posts tagged 'podcast' with audio metadata. Includes a Podcast panel for the Crow's Nest dashboard. No additional server required.

add-ons.name: OpenClaw
add-ons.description: Run OpenClaw, the open-source personal AI assistant, with Crow as its persistent memory and project backend
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Token for accessing the OpenClaw Control UI

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_AI_PROVIDER
env_vars.description: AI provider to use (anthropic, openai, google, ollama)

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_DISCORD_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Discord bot token (from Discord Developer Portal)

env_vars.name: CROW_GATEWAY_URL
env_vars.description: Crow gateway URL for MCP integration (e.g., http://host.docker.internal:3001)

add-ons.notes: Connects to Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack, Signal, iMessage, and more. Configure chat platform tokens after install. Set CROW_GATEWAY_URL to connect Crow tools.

add-ons.name: RoMM
add-ons.description: Retro game library and emulator — browse, organize, and play retro games in the browser
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: ROMM_LIBRARY_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path containing your ROM files (organized by system)

env_vars.name: ROMM_AUTH_SECRET_KEY
env_vars.description: Session secret key for RoMM authentication

add-ons.notes: Organize ROMs into system subdirectories (gba/, snes/, n64/, etc.). IGDB credentials (free) enable automatic cover art and metadata.
